overview: ChickenHunt is a fast-paced browser-based shooting game where players tap chickens across 6 themed worlds. Features level progression, achievements, leaderboards, and synthesized audio — fully rebuilt on the current Caffeine platform for stability.
features: Canvas-based chicken shooting game with 60-second rounds
6 themed worlds: Meadow, Volcano, Space, Desert, Jungle, Snowy
Level progression system (1-100) with XP rewards
Golden chickens with score multiplier bonus
Stopwatch power-up that extends round time
Global leaderboard with correct score sorting
Profile with editable name and picture upload
Synthesized background music and sound effects
Internet Identity login for saving progress
